tasks.label: Launch Extension Host (Insiders)
tasks.command: debug_pid=$(lsof -tiTCP:9333 -sTCP:LISTEN | head -n 1); if [ -n "$debug_pid" ]; then debug_ppid=$(ps -p "$debug_pid" -o ppid= | tr -d ' '); kill "$debug_ppid" 2>/dev/null || kill "$debug_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; open -n '/Applications/Visual Studio Code - Insiders.app' --args --new-window --inspect-extensions=9333 --extensionDevelopmentPath='${workspaceFolder}' '${workspaceFolder}'

tasks.label: Launch Extension Host (Stable)
tasks.command: debug_pid=$(lsof -tiTCP:9334 -sTCP:LISTEN | head -n 1); if [ -n "$debug_pid" ]; then debug_ppid=$(ps -p "$debug_pid" -o ppid= | tr -d ' '); kill "$debug_ppid" 2>/dev/null || kill "$debug_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; open -n '/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app' --args --new-window --inspect-extensions=9334 --extensionDevelopmentPath='${workspaceFolder}' '${workspaceFolder}'
